examples: Chris will either have to take his queen's knight and lose his own knight, or he'll lose a rook.
Dickon brought his fox and his rook and I was going to tell you all about them.
Sometimes the rook flapped his black wings and soared away over the tree-tops in the park.
In chess, it is the equivalent of giving a pawn to capture a rook.
Auctioneer Richard Francis, of Rook Matthew Sayer in Prudhoe, Northumberland, helps run a monthly auction.
